turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello, you've reached support. This is Drew, what can I help with?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Can you confirm the name and email on the account so I can find it?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Sure, it's my name with the email I always use.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: I can't log in, it says my password is wrong but it isn't.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Okay, let me walk you through a couple of checks.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let's clear the app cache and reopen it, that fixes most blank screens.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Forget the steps, escalate me to someone senior right now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I hear you, this has taken too long. Let me bring in a specialist.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Glad it's working now. Is there anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, that's it. Thanks for sticking with it.
